hero_desc: Beyond sports — Los Cab offers a boutique spa, full-service café, event catering, and stunning event venues all on-site.
services_title: Everything You Need, All in One Place

services.title: Gem Day Spa
services.text: Our boutique on-site spa offers a curated menu of non-invasive facial and body procedures in an elegant, relaxing environment. From rejuvenating facials to body treatments — Gem Day Spa is your escape after a great workout.

services.title: Sol Vida OC — Los Cab Café
services.text: Our on-site café "Sol Vida OC" is now open for a soft opening. Grab a coffee, smoothie, salad, sandwich, bagel, or snack before or after your workout. Fresh, delicious fuel to power your day.

services.title: Teak Catering
services.text: Full-service event catering led by Chef Pierre. Whether you're hosting a corporate event, wedding reception, club tournament, or private party — Teak Catering delivers exceptional culinary experiences.

services.title: Timeless Venues
services.text: Our 4,000 sq. ft. versatile event space "Timeless Venues" is perfect for weddings, corporate meetings, galas, tournaments, and private celebrations. A stunning backdrop for any occasion.

amenities_subtitle: Included with every membership — because a great workout deserves great facilities.

amenities.title: Premium Locker Rooms
amenities.text: Spacious, well-maintained locker rooms with premium shower facilities for all members — men's and women's.

amenities.title: Steam & Sauna Rooms
amenities.text: Brand-new steam rooms and sauna rooms added in Winter 2026. Perfect for post-workout recovery.

amenities.title: Co-Ed Jacuzzi
amenities.text: A relaxing co-ed jacuzzi available to all members. Great for unwinding after a game or workout.

amenities.title: Cabanas
amenities.text: Semi-private courtyard cabanas with showers, lockers, fridge, and TV. Located in the tennis courtyard.

amenities.title: Lockers
amenities.text: Monthly locker rentals available in both the men's and women's locker rooms. Stop by the front desk to inquire.

amenities.title: Live Webcams
amenities.text: Live webcam feeds of the Pickleball Stadium, Tennis Center, Gym, and facility entrances — viewable anytime.

cta_text: Book the spa, reserve the venue, or inquire about catering — our team is ready to help.
